name: io.github.dkanster/samotpravil-mcp
title: Samotpravil MCP
description: MCP server for Samotpravil SMTP API — documentation search, typed API tools, and safety flags.

environmentVariables.name: SAMOTPRAVIL_READ_ONLY
environmentVariables.description: When true, block mutating HTTP methods except GET/HEAD

environmentVariables.name: SAMOTPRAVIL_ALLOW_MUTATIONS
environmentVariables.description: When false, block stop-list, domain, authkey and other mutating endpoints

environmentVariables.name: SAMOTPRAVIL_ALLOW_GENERIC_API
environmentVariables.description: When false, disable the generic api_request tool
